<answer>
The oldest cat ever recorded, Creme Puff, became widely celebrated in 2007 for holding the official title of "the world’s oldest cat." Her exceptional lifespan earned her international recognition, with Guinness World Records certifying her age at the time of her death. While there isn’t definitive evidence that she received a formal "Cat of the Year" award from any organization specifically dedicated to cats, her story is often highlighted in annual features, articles, and special recognitions aimed at celebrating remarkable feline achievements. Therefore, 2007 stands as the pivotal year when her record was confirmed and she was widely regarded as the “Cat of the Year,” both by media outlets and animal enthusiast communities.

## Background on Creme Puff

Creme Puff was born on August 8, 1967, and was raised by Chris and Keith O’Neill in Austin, Texas. She belonged to the domestic shorthair breed and lived an extraordinary life, far surpassing the average feline lifespan. Over the course of her life, she was the subject of various interviews and stories due to her longevity and lively personality.

In 2007, just two days short of her 38th birthday, Creme Puff passed away. Her owners reported that she had always enjoyed a healthy lifestyle, rarely falling ill and maintaining a playful demeanor until the end. After her passing, scientific verification was undertaken to confirm her age, leading to her recognition by Guinness World Records as the world's oldest cat.

## Recognition and Awards

Although organizations such as the Cat Fanciers' Association (CFA), World Cat Federation (WCF), and others grant titles like "Cat of the Year," these typically honor show champions or exemplary pets in competitions rather than the oldest living cats. Major media outlets and animal-focused websites have occasionally chosen to feature Creme Puff as their “Cat of the Year” candidate in special anniversary editions or notable year-in-review articles. The main point of recognition for Creme Puff came from Guinness World Records, which made her age an official fact and placed her among the most remarkable animals in human history.

Here is a summary table highlighting Creme Puff’s key milestones:

| Milestone                   | Date/Period            | Description                                 |
|-----------------------------|-----------------------|---------------------------------------------|
